content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Spy Syndrome 2". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/633/problem/C
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of elements in the array. The second line contains n space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the maximum number of pairs that can be formed.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: To solve this problem, we can use a bipartite graph and find the maximum matching in it.
